chief_complaint: Bilateral flank pain for 2 days, with lower limb numbness and weakness since yesterday

admission_diagnoses.text: Lower limb motor deficits and numbness,T9 compression fracture with cord compression related
admission_diagnoses.raw_quote: Lower limb motor deficits and numbness,T9 compression fracture with cord compression related

timeline.event: 啟動 TPOG RMS HR 2016 化療計畫
timeline.raw_quote: under protocol of TPOG RMS HR 2016(2025/6/2-)

timeline.event: 啟動 TPOG RMS HR 2016 化療計畫
timeline.raw_quote: under protocol of TPOG RMS HR 2016(2025/6/2-)

timeline.event: 左前臂腫瘤床放療 (5040cGy/28fx)
timeline.raw_quote: s/p R/T over tumor bed of left forearm(5040cGy/28fx,10/22-12/10)

timeline.raw_quote: left axilla LN (4140cGy/23fx,10/22-12/3) from 2025/10/22

timeline.event: 左前臂腫瘤床放療 (5040cGy/28fx)
timeline.raw_quote: s/p R/T over tumor bed of left forearm(5040cGy/28fx,10/22-12/10)

timeline.event: 左腋下淋巴結放療 (4140cGy/23fx)
timeline.raw_quote: left axilla LN (4140cGy/23fx,10/22-12/3) from 2025/10/22

timeline.event: 第 35 週 VAC 化療 (Vincristine, Cyclophosphamide, Dactinomycin)
timeline.raw_quote: s/p chemotherapy with week 35 chemotherapy VAC (Vincristine, Cyclophosphamide, Dactinomycin) during 02/13-02/14

timeline.event: 第 38 週化療 VAC (Vincristine, Cyclophosphamide, Dactinomycin)
timeline.raw_quote: s/p chemotherapy with week 38 chemotherapy VAC (Vincristine, Cyclophosphamide, Dactinomycin) during 03/06-03/07

timeline.event: T9 pathological fracture 進行 surgical decompression
timeline.raw_quote: Following surgical decompression on 03/25, her weakness and numbness improeved significantly initially.

timeline.event: 發生 transient hypotension 並調整 opioid analgesics 劑量
timeline.raw_quote: The postoperative course was complicated by transient hypotension, leading to the titration of opioid analgesics on 03/27.

timeline.event: 轉至一般病房，開始管理 adynamic ileus 與 neurogenic bowel
timeline.raw_quote: After transferring to the general ward on 04/02, the clinical focus shifted to management of adynamic ileus and neurogenic bowel.

timeline.event: 停止 morphine 並開始使用 prokinetic agents (Primperan, Mosapride)
timeline.raw_quote: On 04/06, morphine was withheld and prokinetic agents (Primperan, Mosapride) were initiated, resulting in gradual improvement of abdominal pain.

timeline.event: 移除手術縫線與 CVP line，並建立 Port-A
timeline.raw_quote: On 04/07, surgical sutures and the CVP line were removed, and a Port-A was successfully established for long-term access.

timeline.event: 因 hypomagnesemia 開始 MgO 補充
timeline.raw_quote: Due to identified hypomagnesemia, MgO supplementation was started.

timeline.event: 恢復 VAC chemotherapy regimen
timeline.raw_quote: Oncologic treatment resumed on 04/08 with the VAC chemotherapy regimen and pending RT simulation.

timeline.event: 因 epigastric pain 開始使用 PPI
timeline.raw_quote: intermittent epigastric pain persisted, prompting the initiation of a PPI on 04/08

timeline.event: Gastroenterology 會診
timeline.raw_quote: and a Gastroenterology consultation on 04/09.

timeline.event: 腹部超音波顯示 minimal ascites, some stool and normal bowel movement
timeline.raw_quote: An abdominal ultrasound on 4/10 showed minimal ascites,some stool and normal bowel movement.

timeline.event: 化療引起嚴重 cytopenias (Platelets 11K, Hb 7.3)，需輸血 (PRBC, platelet)
timeline.raw_quote: During this week(4/11-17), the patient faced profound chemotherapy-induced cytopenias (Platelets 11K, Hb 7.3), requiring PRBC and platelet transfusions.

timeline.event: 活動後出現 sudden paraplegia
timeline.raw_quote: Unfortunately,sudden paraplegia was noted on 4/12 after movement.

timeline.event: 出現雙側腰痛 (bilateral flank pain)
timeline.raw_quote: According to the patient, bilateral flank pain developed 2 days prior to admission

timeline.event: 出現下肢麻木與無力
timeline.raw_quote: followed by lower limb numbness and weakness since yesterday

timeline.event: MRI 確認 disease progression，T9 level 腫瘤增大
timeline.raw_quote: Follow-up MRI on 04/16 confirmed the clinical suspicion of disease progression, showing increased tumor size and extent at the T9 level.

timeline.event: 影像顯示 T9 脊椎塌陷導致 spinal canal stenosis，以及 T11, L3 受累
timeline.raw_quote: Imaging revealed collapse of T9 vertebra with soft tissue lesion causing spinal canal stenosis, along with additional vertebral involvement (T11, L3).

timeline.event: 診斷為 spinal cord compression syndrome
timeline.raw_quote: Clinical findings of motor weakness (grade ~3/5) and sensory changes were noted, compatible with spinal cord compression syndrome.

timeline.event: 開始 dexamethasone 治療
timeline.raw_quote: Neurosurgical consultation was obtained at PER, and dexamethasone therapy was initiated.

timeline.event: 白血球低下 (WBC 1.57 K/uL)
timeline.raw_quote: Due to leukopenia (WBC 1.57 K/uL) and concern for neurologic progression, the patient was admitted to the PICU

timeline.event: 發生 neutropenic fever
timeline.raw_quote: Due to neutropenic fever on 4/17

timeline.event: 開始使用 tazocin 與 GM 治療
timeline.raw_quote: tazocin and GM initiated on 04/17

timeline.event: 接受輸血 (transfusions)
timeline.raw_quote: transfusions (04/17-18, 04/20)

timeline.event: BE(b) 數值 2.7 mmol/L 與 -3.2 mmol/L
Finger sugar 67 mg/dL
timeline.raw_quote: 20260417 ... Finger sugar 67 mg/dL Fasting: <= 100 ; random <= 140

timeline.event: 血液學最低點 (hematologic nadir)，WBC 降至 0.31K (ANC < 100)
timeline.raw_quote: e hematologic nadir this week, with WBC dropping to 0.31K (ANC ＜ 100) on 04/20

timeline.event: 接受輸血 (transfusions)
timeline.raw_quote: transfusions (04/17-18, 04/20)

timeline.event: 恢復放射治療 (resumed RT)
timeline.raw_quote: Radiotherapy was briefly held due to profound cytopenia but resumed on 04/22

timeline.event: NGS 檢測發現 PIK3CA H1047R 突變
timeline.raw_quote: On 04/22, Next-Generation Sequencing (NGS) revealed a PIK3CA H1047R mutation

timeline.event: 出現顯著肋骨疼痛與喉嚨痛
timeline.raw_quote: Since the resumption of RT, she has developed significant rib pain and a sore throat (04/23)

timeline.event: 開始使用 everolimus 與 alpelisib 標靶治療
timeline.raw_quote: Target therapy with everolims and alpelisib 1# qod alternatively was added on since 04/24 based on NGS report

timeline.event: Jeavons syndrome 癲癇發作 (seizure attack)
timeline.raw_quote: Suspect Jeavons syndrome, with seizure attack on 9/12

timeline.event: 持續進行 Radiotherapy 以控制症狀
timeline.raw_quote: Radiotherapy continues for symptom control, but the prognosis remains poor due to rapid tumor regrowth during systemic therapy.

residues retention.
Borederline dilatation of colon. Suggest clinical correlation.

pathology.diagnosis: Spine, T9, "1", tumor curretage and cord decompression --- Metastatic rhabdomyosarcoma, compatible with alveolar rhabdomyosarcoma
pathology.raw_quote:
Pathological diagnosis:
Spine, T9, "1", tumor curretage and cord decompression
--- Metastatic rhabdomyosarcoma, compatible with alveolar
rhabdomyosarcoma
Gross:
The specimen consists of multiple pieces of tan-brown soft and
firm tissue, labelled spine T9, "1", measuring up to 0.7 x
0.5 x 0.3 cm. All are embedded for sections in two blocks as
A~B. (Note: A= non-decalcified part, B= decalcified part)
Microscopy:
The sections of the specimen show a picture of infiltrative
small round blue neoplastic cells with extreme high N/C ratio
and crushed artifact in the soft tissue and bone tissue,
demonstrating positive for Desmin, Myogenin and Myo-D1
immunostains(stains performed in PATH#15-11834).
Combined with clinical history, metastatic rhabdomyosarcoma is
considered, and compatible with alveolar

treatment_course_raw:
The patient was admitted for T9 pathological fracture with spinal cord compression. Following surgical
decompression on 03/25, her weakness and numbness improeved significantly initially. The postoperative
course was complicated by transient hypotension, leading to the titration of opioid analgesics on 03/27. After
transferring to the general ward on 04/02, the clinical focus shifted to management of adynamic ileus and
neurogenic bowel. Despite regular laxatives, persistent abdominal pain and fecal loading were noted. On
04/06, morphine was withheld and prokinetic agents (Primperan, Mosapride) were initiated, resulting in
gradual improvement of abdominal pain.
On 04/07, surgical sutures and the CVP line were removed, and a Port-A was successfully established for
long-term access. Due to identified hypomagnesemia, MgO supplementation was started. Oncologic treatment
resumed on 04/08 with the VAC chemotherapy regimen and pending RT simulation. Although back pain has
improved with mobilization, intermittent epigastric pain persisted, prompting the initiation of a PPI on 04/08
and a Gastroenterology consultation on 04/09. An abdominal ultrasound on 4/10 showed minimal ascites,some
stool and normal bowel movement.
During this week(4/11-17), the patient faced profound chemotherapy-induced cytopenias (Platelets 11K, Hb
7.3), requiring PRBC and platelet transfusions. Unfortunately,sudden paraplegia was noted on 4/12 after
movement. Follow-up MRI on 04/16 confirmed the clinical suspicion of disease progression, showing
increased tumor size and extent at the T9 level. Radiotherapy continues for symptom control, but the
prognosis remains poor due to rapid tumor regrowth during systemic therapy.Her family also refused further
operation.
(04/18-04/26)
The patient experienced a severe hematologic nadir this week, with WBC dropping to 0.31K (ANC ＜ 100)
on 04/20. Due to neutropenic fever on 4/17,tazocin and GM initiated on 04/17. The blood culture and urine
culture showed negative results. Radiotherapy was briefly held due to profound cytopenia but resumed on
04/22 as counts recovered (WBC 3.15K) following G-CSF support and transfusions (04/17-18, 04/20). On
04/22, Next-Generation Sequencing (NGS) revealed a PIK3CA H1047R mutation, and the family has
expressed a desire to explore targeted therapy options despite limited evidence. Neurologically, lower
extremity paralysis remains unchanged. Since the resumption of RT, she has developed significant rib pain
and a sore throat (04/23), necessitating the addition of Gabapentin for neuropathic pain and topical throat
sprays. Target therapy with everolims and alpelisib 1# qod alternatively was added on since 04/24 based on
NGS report. As of 04/27, she is hemodynamically stable and recovering from the chemotherapy nadir,
continuing palliative radiotherapy, target therapy and symptom-focused care.
Due to residence in Tainan,her parents want further care in Tainan.
